executives.name: James Farley, Jr.
executives.background: Jim Farley is Ford President and Chief Executive Officer, and a member of the Board of Directors. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer and has held various leadership roles since joining Ford in 2007.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: John Lawler
executives.background: John Lawler is Ford Vice Chair and Chief Financial Officer. He has held numerous financial leadership positions at Ford, including President of Ford China and Controller.

tenure_dates.title: Vice Chair and Chief Financial Officer

Various roles including Vice President, Strategy; CEO of Ford Autonomous Vehicles; Vice President of Mobility Partnerships; Controller of Ford of Europe’s Product Development; Finance leadership with Mazda Motor Corporation

executives.name: William Clay Ford, Jr.
executives.background: Bill Ford is Executive Chair of Ford Motor Company. He has been a member of the Board since 1988 and served as CEO from 2001 to 2006.

tenure_dates.title: Director (1988–Present), Chairman of the Board (1999–Present), CEO (2001–2006), Various management positions (Prior to 1999)

executives.name: Kumar Galhotra
executives.background: Kumar Galhotra is Chief Operating Officer, Ford Blue. He previously served as President, Ford Blue and President, Americas & International Markets Group.

tenure_dates.title: Various Engineering and Leadership roles (including Vice President, Engineering)

executives.name: Doug Field
executives.background: Doug Field is Chief EV, Digital and Design Officer, Ford Model e. He joined Ford from Apple in 2021 and previously worked at Tesla.

tenure_dates.title: Chief EV, Digital and Design Officer
Chief Advanced Technology and Embedded Systems Officer / Chief Electric Vehicles and Digital Systems Officer

executives.name: Alexandra Ford English
executives.background: Director, Global Brand Merchandising, Ford Motor Company. Daughter of Bill Ford.

executives.name: Alicia Boler Davis
executives.background: CEO of Alto Pharmacy. Former Senior Vice President of Global Customer Fulfillment at Amazon.

executives.name: Beth Mooney
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, KeyCorp.

executives.name: Henry Ford III
executives.background: Former Director, Investor Relations, Ford Motor Company. Son of Edsel B. Ford II.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Member of the Board of Directors)

executives.name: James Hackett
executives.background: President of Tessellation Services, LLC. Former Executive Chairman of Anadarko Petroleum Corporation.

executives.name: John May
executives.background: John C. May is Chairman of the Board of Directors and Chief Executive Officer of Deere & Company. He is responsible for leading the company's efforts to provide advanced equipment and technology solutions for customers in the agriculture, construction, and forestry industries. May joined John Deere in 1997 and has held various leadership roles across the company.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: John Veihmeyer
executives.background: Former Chairman, KPMG International.

executives.name: Jon Huntsman, Jr.
executives.background: Former U.S. Ambassador to Russia, China, and Singapore. Director since 2020.

executives.name: Joseph Hinrichs
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of CSX since September 2022. Previously served as President, Automotive at Ford Motor Company from 2019 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: President, Ford Automotive (and various executive roles)

executives.name: Kimberly Casiano
executives.background: Former President and COO of Casiano Communications, Inc.

executives.name: Lynn Vojvodich Radakovich
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce.

executives.name: Paul Mascarenas
executives.background: Paul A. Mascarenas has served as a director since 2014. He previously served as Chief Technical Officer and Vice President of Ford Motor Company.

executives.name: Sherif Marakby
executives.background: Mr. Marakby has served as a director since 2021. He is an advisor to various mobility companies and previously served as President and CEO of Ford Autonomous Vehicles LLC and Vice President of Autonomous Vehicles and Mobility at Ford.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Autonomous Vehicles and Electrification

executives.name: William Helman IV
executives.background: General Partner, Greylock Partners.

executives.background: Former Chairman of the U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC).
